name: Bryan Steil
tweet: Currently, if 529 account withdrawals are not used for qualified education expenses or tuition for elementary or secondary schools, they are subject to state and federal income taxes and an additional 10% federal tax penalty on earnings of the account. 6/9

name: Bryan Steil
tweet: 529 plans were recently expanded to cover high school & elementary school tuition. Especially during this unique time, it is important to allow families to use money that has been set aside for their kid’s education, without being taxed & penalized by the federal government. 5/9

name: Bryan Steil
tweet: What are 529 plans? A 529 plan is a tax-advantaged savings plan designed to encourage saving for future education costs. It is like a retirement account for qualified education expenses. Typically, these plans have been used for higher education costs, like college tuition. 4/9

name: Bryan Steil
tweet: Parents & schools are facing unique challenges while trying to educate our children from home. These can range from lack of economic resources to lack of tools necessary for distance education. Congress should change 529 plans to help students & families ease the burden. 3/9

tweet: Because of what was in their hearts – patriotism, love, honor – it allowed them to overcome the great emotions that must have been going through their minds.   Our troops climbed those cliffs, and, in the end, they freed Europe.

name: Bryan Steil
tweet: These brave men endeavored on this pursuit because of their love for America, their love for their family, their love for their fellow countrymen, and for their love of the ideals that Americans believe in.
